sheet_name: แบบขยายห้องน้ำ WC.1, WC.2
source_image: image/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_01/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_01_หน้า19.png
view_title: รูปตัดห้องน้ำ WC.1, WC.2 (มุม 1)

elements.description: Interior wall elevation showing full-height ceramic tile from floor to a mirror strip near the top; overall wall height 2.70m, tile/fixture zone breakdown 0.60(lower)+0.20+0.20+1.00(upper mirror strip)+0.70(top band, reading bottom to top)
Mirror (M.), left of elevation, above LAV.1
Counter-mounted wash basin (LAV.1) below the mirror
Hand-held shower head (SW.) with hose, right side of elevation, in the shower zone
Bottom horizontal dimension chain: 0.30 + 0.40 + 0.30 (shower-zone partition sub-split), overall room width groupings 1.70 and 0.40, and separately 2.10 total (1.00+0.10+1.00)

warnings: This sheet (A-17) shows two interior wall elevations/sections of the WC.1/WC.2 bathroom, cut in different directions (labelled '1' and '2' at the bottom, matching section-cut arrows on the plan sheet หน้า18); this file covers view '1'. View '2' is in _หน้า19_wc_section2.json.

หมายเหตุ printed below both sections: ระดับฝ้าห้องน้ำ WC.1 = 2.70 ม., ระดับฝ้าห้องน้ำ WC.2 = 2.50 ม. — the ceiling height differs slightly between the two floors' bathrooms even though the plan layout is shared.

Fine tile-coursing sub-dimensions (0.60/0.20/0.20/1.00/0.70 breakdown of the 2.70m wall) are small print and only medium confidence; flagged for zoom review, same caveat pattern as the sister houses' equivalent sheet.
